author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: info_admin_config_exposed
summary: Detects unauthenticated GET on an admin / application configuration endpoint. Walks a small catalog of conventional paths and emits a finding when the response is shaped like a configuration document (top-level config/application/server keys, or >=3 admin-flavoured field-name tokens nested inside).

args.--url: Target origin URL (probe sweeps /rest/admin/application-configuration and similar paths under it)
